name_cn:
Authentic Grade
SERPENTI FOREVER EAST-WEST Small Shoulder Bag ❤
Crafted from emerald green calfskin, this piece interprets timeless elegance with a fashionable and avant-garde silhouette.
Featuring a practical leather shoulder strap and a classic snake-head magnetic clasp, the seductive scales draw inspiration from the 1960s SERPENTI jewelry collection, making it perfect for daily wear.
Equipped with a single compartment, a front pocket, a back patch pocket, an internal quilted pocket, three card slots, and a customizable vanity mirror.
Dimensions: 22 x 15 x 4.5 cm
Model: 292104
